overall.description: A stationary third-person perspective from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy style) showing a gothic great hall interior. The scene features ornate stone architecture, a central fountain with an equestrian statue, and students in dark robes walking through the hall. The camera observes from an elevated balcony position with atmospheric artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with central fountain and elevated balcony overlook

tall pointed stone archway matching the left side
geometric patterned marble flooring with red and gold accents in a circular design
massive wall covering depicting a landscape scene covering the entire back wall
grand curved staircase with stone balustrades leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: From an elevated balcony position, the camera observes a grand gothic hall with a central fountain statue as the focal point. Students in dark robes continuously walk through the hall below, moving in various directions across the ornate marble floor. The stone architecture features pointed arches, columns, and a massive tapestry on the far wall, all lit by atmospheric artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective over a grand gothic hall, capturing the rhythmic movement of students within a static, atmospheric environment. It begins from a high balcony position, looking down upon a central fountain statue that serves as the focal point of the vast space. As the camera observes the scene, students in dark robes drift across the ornate marble floor in various directions, their movement contrasting with the stillness of the surrounding stone. The view then encompasses the architectural depth of the hall, shifting focus toward the pointed arches, columns, and a massive tapestry on the far wall. Finally, the scene settles into the moody glow of artificial lighting that casts deep shadows across the gothic interior.
